g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Era 1 Autocomplete AI in the context of software engineering')
sendPrompt('How does autocomplete AI differ from an agent technically?')
sendPrompt('What are the limitations of the Assistant AI era?')
sendPrompt('How does assistant AI work in Era 2?')
sendPrompt('In Era 2, why is the human still the agent acting in the world?')
sendPrompt('What does the human director role look like in agentic AI?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the PRAO loop inside an AI agent')
sendPrompt('What does World mean in agentic AI? Files, APIs, shell commands?')
